permutation.interpretation: p=0.000. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 1.587, 95% CI [0.720, 2.411]. CI excludes zero — Sharpe is statistically meaningful.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 28.2% of total P&L (209 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
